pages: Bounded vision verified page evidence for PDF pages 133-140 and 285-286 (printed pages 132-139 and 284-285)
verification_scope: page-scoped source authority for the Monster Island totemic cult template, spirit attitude/rank gates, and example kahuna spirit loadouts only; exact app-facing STARTING_SPIRITS data was not regenerated in this pass
verification_notes: PDF pages 133-140 and 285-286 have rendered page hashes, bounded extraction artifacts, and independent verifier artifacts under references/sources/evidence/monster-island/. The source revision remains non-active/permission-pending, so this is reference evidence rather than app-facing promotion.

spirit_cult_template.description: All of Monster Island's totemic cults follow an identical structure. This template is the Monster Island approach Hannu recommended for spirit cults.

structure.note: Healing is not a primary role of kahunas (shamans); that skill is left to dowager-matriarchs.

follower.description: Every adult member of the tribe. Can observe spirits within range.
follower.spirit_access: None — followers cannot locate, summon, or bind spirits on their own

worshipper.description: 2-5 per settlement, undertaking shamanic training. Collectively known as Kahuna.
worshipper.spirit_access: Can locate, summon from afar, and bind spirits FRIENDLY to their cult
worshipper.note: Based on reaffirming ancient pacts between the cult and that spirit type

shaman.description: At least one per settlement. Attends to the needs of the village.
shaman.spirit_access: Can summon from afar and bind spirits NEUTRAL to their cult (requires questing or stumbling upon them, then forming a personal pact)
shaman.fetch: Gained during initiation quest. Fetch has same INT, POW, CHA as the shaman. Gains 1d3 + (weeks wandered) fetch abilities.

high_shaman.description: 1-2 per tribe. Political role, keeping balance between tribes.
high_shaman.spirit_access: Can bind HOSTILE spirits (but cannot summon them from afar — must encounter them). Also learns cult secrets: where tribal gods are bound, how to awaken them, and how to re-bind them.
high_shaman.gifts: May learn cult's secret totem Gift. May also select a second Gift from any other cult.

spirit_lord.description: One per island (inter-tribal role). Guides all tribal shamans with rigorous neutrality.
spirit_lord.spirit_access: Treats all non-friendly spirits as Neutral. Learns secret locations of all tribal gods.
spirit_lord.gifts: May master a second cult Gift of his choice.

spirit_attitude_system.description: Each cult has its own stable of spirit types categorized by attitude. Anything not listed as friendly or neutral defaults to hostile. Elemental spirits are hostile to ALL totemic cults.
spirit_attitude_system.friendly: Worshipper rank+ can locate, summon, and bind
spirit_attitude_system.neutral: Shaman rank+ can summon and bind (requires personal pact)
spirit_attitude_system.hostile: High Shaman rank+ can bind (cannot summon from afar)

chargen_spirit_generation.description: How to generate spirits for starting animist characters, based on Monster Island NPC stat blocks.
chargen_spirit_generation.approach: Each kahuna possesses a number of fetishes as part of their status. Every tribe has its own selection of friendly and neutral spirits.

derived_formulas.discorporate: 50% + POW + CHA (same as spectral combat, for spirits with INT)

example_spirit_worshipper_loadout.note: Based on Monster Island NPC stat blocks for Spirit Worshippers (Assistant Shamans)

example_shaman_loadout.note: Based on Monster Island NPC stat blocks for full Shamans

example_high_shaman_loadout.note: Based on Monster Island NPC stat blocks for High Shamans

spirit_types_available.description: Spirit types that appear in Monster Island cult stat blocks

friendly_types.ability: Endowment — grants a physical trait of the totem animal
Bless — boosts one Attribute or Skill
Domination — commands creatures of the totem species
Grants ability to take totem animal form

neutral_types.description: Spirits not aligned with any particular cult. Have INT instead of INS, plus Discorporate and Stealth skills.

hostile_types.description: Spirits actively opposed to the cult. Same stat format as neutral but with hostile attitude.

glorantha_applicability.note: Hannu recommended Monster Island approach for spirit cults. The template maps to Gloranthan animist cults as follows:

mapping.totemic_cult: Gloranthan spirit cult (e.g., Daka Fal, Waha's shamanic aspect)
mapping.friendly_spirits: Spirits listed in the one-pager's spell/miracle section
mapping.cult_skills: Replace Monster Island's Dance/Sing with cult-specific skills from one-pager
mapping.spirit_rune_adaptation: Per Hannu: Binding → Spirit Rune affinity

source_ref.verification_scope: totemic cult structure, spirit attitude rank gates, random spirit tables, and example kahuna spirit loadouts

attestation.verification_notes: Candidate pages have bounded extraction and independent verifier artifacts. This promotes Monster Island as page-scoped reference evidence for the raw spirit template and loadout summaries, not as a change to STARTING_SPIRITS.
